scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared && concurrently "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.dev:server: pnpm run build:shared && concurrently "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm --filter server dev"
scripts.dev:client: pnpm run build:shared && concurrently "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.test: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter client test && pnpm --filter server test
scripts.build:client: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.build:server: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
